name: hands-on-modern-rl
description: 🚀 An open-source, hands-on curriculum bridging the gap from basic RL concepts to LLM alignment, RLVR, and advanced Agentic systems.
summaryZh: 🚀 An open-source, hands-on curriculum bridging the gap from basic RL concepts to LLM alignment, RLVR, and advanced Agentic systems.  这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
